export_set_contradictory_high_confidence.expected_failure_reason: contradictory high-confidence candidate is rejected by typed contradiction handling

export_set_deeper_chain_current_limit_ab.expected_failure_reason: current typed verifier does not accept this deeper exported chain in the candidate bridge
export_set_deeper_chain_current_limit_ab.reason: no typed channel produced support or a typed rejection

export_set_malformed_node_completion_rej.claim: two is the path from node two to node two
export_set_malformed_node_completion_rej.expected_failure_reason: malformed raw completion is rejected as an unparsable graph claim
export_set_malformed_node_completion_rej.reason: candidate claim could not be parsed as a graph relation

export_set_valid_pqr_with_high_confidenc.reason: candidate reverses a directed support path

export_set_wrong_completion_abstained.expected_failure_reason: wrong completion remains unsupported by typed channels
export_set_wrong_completion_abstained.reason: no typed channel produced support or a typed rejection

claim: Multiple real exported TensionLM-side samples can cross into TS-Reasoner while staying contained by typed verification.
known_limitations: Uses existing TensionLM-side eval artifacts rather than running new model samples in this repo.
Export-side normalized claims are evaluated by TS-Reasoner unchanged.
No TensionLM model is loaded into TS-Reasoner.
The set is small and focused on transitivity-shaped exported samples.
scope: Existing exported JSONL set only; no model loading or training inside TS-Reasoner.
tensions_detected: real exported completions include wrong, malformed, contradictory, and unsupported candidates
some correct deeper-chain exported samples exceed the current candidate-bridge support depth
candidate confidence can be higher for bad candidates than for valid candidates
tensions_resolved: raw completions are preserved as candidate provenance
typed channels remain the proof authority
per-sample failure reasons are preserved in the aggregate report
unresolved_tensions: larger real TensionLM export sets remain future work
